title: Villager Souls
body:
With this mod, villagers are much easier to obtain!

Whenever a villager, zombie villager, or a raider dies, they have a 25% chance of dropping an Illager Soul. When crafted with a piece of Glowstone Dust, you'll get a Villager Soul. Use the Villager Soul on a Carved Pumpkin, and you'll create a villager!

[![ko-fi](https://ko-fi.com/img/githubbutton_sm.svg)](https://ko-fi.com/Z8Z714G8U7)
